title: Quantized Lattice Annealing
content:
Petra Severin led a research group at the Northaven Center for Instrumentation in Mossenden that advanced quantized lattice annealing. The group's foundational results were published in 1843.

Theory.

Graduate instrumentation courses now teach the principles behind the 1843 measurement protocol.

Apparatus.

Annual conferences in Mossenden feature workshops devoted to safety protocols for field deployment.
